problem id: 99bda3b2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10001010 -> 00101010
  00101111 -> 00111100
  01001101 -> 00110101
  00111111 -> 00111100
  00101000 -> 10100000
  00000000 -> 00000000
  01101110 -> 00111001
  00110100 -> 11010000

query: 10110100
predicted answer: 11010010
